description:
**Milestone:** Phase 3: Framework Adapters

Create Angular directive wrappers auto-generated from CEM. Uses CUSTOM_ELEMENTS_SCHEMA with typed directive wrappers. Angular schematics for easy installation.

**Files to Modify:**
- packages/angular/

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] CEM-to-Angular codegen script
- [ ] Typed directive wrappers for all components
- [ ] Angular schematics for ng add @helixds/angular
- [ ] Two-way binding for form components
- [ ] Works with Angular 17+ SSR
- [ ] Published as @helixds/angular

**Complexity:** large
title: Build @helix/angular package with CEM-generated wrappers
